verbatim_text: You know what I mean? The wrong line is... You cannot push it below zero. There must be some point. Now, I think the hardest of this research is that it's difficult to tell whether... You know, if you plateau, right? Whether that plateau is because the problem is inherently at its... At its boundary, right? Or because your method isn't good enough. I think that's just something I discovered that's inherent to discovery problems. So I wouldn't be able to give you an exact answer. All right? Yes, please. So the fact that the tail on the left goes all the way to your original distribution, that's not an artifact, right?
